founders.name: Debasish
founders.bio: Debasish is a high agency, outcome driven operator with over a decade of experience in architecting global GTM, revenue related business strategies and building global operations from ground up to carry out scaled execution. As a specialist in B2B technology firms and in industries like Fintech, Legal Tech, etc., he has a proven track record of transforming fragmented business functions into cohesive, high growth engines. In the Post-AI world, apart from strategy & ops, he's been leading innovation at the cutting edge of Coding, Integrations & AI applications, bridging the gap between complex technology & practical business utility & impact. Overall, he brings a multi-disciplinary lens to solve the Lead-to-Cash puzzle and unwind GTM.

founders.name: Vaibhav
founders.bio: Vaibhav is a systems-first Sales & Marketing Operations leader with years of hands-on experience turning fragmented GTM infrastructure into clean, scalable revenue engines. Rooted in B2B SaaS, he has built Sales & Marketing Operations functions from the ground up — owning the full stack of People, Process, Data, Enablement, and Systems — and has consistently translated that execution into measurable pipeline impact. His expertise sits at the intersection of lifecycle orchestration, marketing automation, and data architecture. From designing ICP frameworks to introducing pipeline layers that gave leadership first-time funnel visibility before MQL, Vaibhav has a track record of solving problems that most operators don't even recognise exist until they surface as a broken quarter. In the Post-AI world, Vaibhav has leaned into building AI-native GTM workflows combining tools like Clay, n8n, Zapier, and HeyReach with LLM-assisted processes to eliminate manual overhead and accelerate execution without adding headcount. His approach is pragmatic: AI where it scales, deterministic logic where it governs.

founders.name: Aishwarya
founders.bio: Aishwarya is a curious person who loves to solve business problems through data, systems, and technology to drive revenue and business growth. With majors in Industrial Engineering & Management and an Intermediate in Chartered Accountancy, they bring a unique blend of Data, Engineering, Systems, and Finance — the core pillars for business success. Aishwarya specialises in Revenue Operations for B2B Tech and SaaS companies, with experience setting up and optimising Revenue Operations & Strategy across multiple Unicorns and Soonicorns globally, both as a full-time employee and as a consultant.
